privileged_info_summary: The task configure_strict_capture_filter@1 requires capturing ONLY ICMP traffic on the eth0 interface using Wireshark. The output must be saved as a PCAPNG file at /home/ga/Documents/captures/icmp_strict.pcapng containing a minimum of 10 ICMP packets with exactly zero non-ICMP packets (strict capture filter requirement). The task generates synthetic data: users run 'ping -c 10 8.8.8.8' which produces approximately 20 ICMP packets (10 requests + 10 replies). Background HTTP noise is generated by the setup script (HTTP server on localhost and curl requests to Example.com). The verifier uses tshark to count ICMP packets (filter: 'icmp') and non-ICMP packets (filter: 'not icmp') from the saved file. To pass, the file must contain at least 10 ICMP packets and zero non-ICMP packets (score >= 90/100 required).
